commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ceda6e228324c84be946998d9aa0911430549c67)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds quote-aware shell rendering for runtime placeholders, applies it to shell-mode execution checks and background services, and adds regression coverage for whitespace, metacharacters, quoted placeholders, and services.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than an executed repro: current main renders shell=True commands with render_template and then passes them to /bin/sh, so whitespace and metacharacters in placeholder values are interpreted by the shell.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocker is a compatibility/product decision for collaborator-authored shell placeholder semantics, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: [codex] fix shell runtime value quoting
target.body:
## Summary
- add quote-aware shell rendering for runtime placeholders
- use it for `shell=True` execution checks in both verifier implementations
- use the same renderer for background service commands
- add regression coverage for whitespace paths, shell metacharacters, pre-quoted placeholders, and background services

## Root Cause
`ExecutionCheck.shell` defaults to `True`, but the shell path rendered placeholders with plain string substitution and then passed the command to `/bin/sh -c`. Runtime values containing whitespace were split by the shell, and metacharacters could be interpreted as shell syntax.

## Compatibility
The new renderer quotes unquoted placeholders with `shlex.quote`, but detects existing single-quoted and double-quoted placeholder contexts so downstream task templates like `cat "{output_file}"` and `cat '{output_file}'` continue to work.

Fixes #29.

## Validation
- `/tmp/clawbench-shell-render-venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_execution_shell_rendering.py tests/test_environment_files.py tests/test_environment.py tests/test_services.py`
- `/tmp/clawbench-shell-render-venv/bin/python -m ruff check clawbench/render.py clawbench/environment.py clawbench/environment_files.py clawbench/services.py tests/test_execution_shell_rendering.py tests/test_services.py`
- `/tmp/clawbench-shell-render-venv/bin/python -m compileall clawbench/render.py clawbench/environment.py clawbench/environment_files.py clawbench/services.py`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: scoootscooob
